da.hero_title: Bliv en del af Yoga Bible
da.hero_lead: Yoga Bible er en professionel skole, hvor mennesker kan udvikle sig fra regelmæssig praksis til undervisning, specialisering og dybere faglighed. Vi udvider teamet med erfarne undervisere, mentorer og kreative profiler.
da.hero_li2: Moduler i anatomi, filosofi, breathwork, pre/postnatal m.m.
da.hero_li5: Marketing, SoMe, filming, editing og content
da.hero_fine: Vi tager imod både konkrete forespørgsler og idéer til nye forløb, workshops eller uddannelsesmoduler.
da.need_subtitle: Vi samarbejder med erfarne profiler, der kan løfte dele af vores uddannelser, kurser eller skabe nye forløb sammen med os.
da.need_card1_desc: Erfarne undervisere i alle stilarter — til klasser, events og samarbejde.
da.need_card3_desc: 30–50 timers forløb, weekend intensives, workshops og masterclasses.
da.need_card4_desc: 1:1 forløb i praksis, undervisning og business.
da.need_card5_desc: Hjælp os med at fortælle historien — skarpt, roligt og professionelt.
da.need_card6_desc: Struktur, kundeoplevelse og kommunikation med høj standard.
da.need_idea_desc: Hvis du vil introducere en ny disciplin eller et nyt koncept, vil vi meget gerne høre det.
da.steps_subtitle: En enkel proces — tydelige forventninger, høj kvalitet og et professionelt setup.
da.step1_desc: Du sender en kort pitch + baggrund. Vi svarer hurtigt med næste step.
da.step2_desc: Vi afstemmer indhold, målgruppe, tidsplan og økonomi (projekt, modul eller fast samarbejde).
da.step3_desc: Vi starter ofte med et pilotforløb, så vi sikrer den rigtige oplevelse for eleverne.
da.steps_cta_desc: Vi er altid åbne for at møde dygtige mennesker med stærke kompetencer.
da.why_subtitle: Vi arbejder med en klar faglig retning og et publikum, der ønsker progression — ikke støj.
da.why1_desc: Struktur, metode og høj standard i undervisning, formidling og elevoplevelse.
da.why2_desc: Elever og praktiserende der tager deres udvikling seriøst — fra basics til specialisering.
da.why3_desc: Basen er i København, med mulighed for modulbaseret samarbejde og fleksible formater.
da.what_we_ask_desc: Kort introduktion, erfaring, forslag til format — og gerne CV/portfolio.
da.faq_subtitle: Få svar på de mest almindelige spørgsmål.
da.faq1_a: Vi underviser primært på dansk og engelsk. Nogle moduler kan være bilingual afhængigt af holdet.
da.faq2_q: Er det fast ansættelse eller projekt?
da.faq2_a: Begge dele. Mange samarbejder starter projektbaseret (workshop/modul) og kan udvikle sig.
da.faq3_q: Hvad hvis jeg vil foreslå et helt nyt kursus?
da.faq3_a: Perfekt. Vælg "Andet samarbejde" i formularen og beskriv idéen, målgruppen og varighed.
da.faq4_a: Ja. Upload små filer (CV/billeder). For store videoer: indsæt et link (YouTube/Vimeo/Drive) i beskedfeltet.
da.bottom_cta_title: Vi glæder os til at høre fra dig
da.bottom_cta_desc: Send din forespørgsel — vi vender tilbage hurtigt med næste step.
da.modal_lead: Fortæl os kort hvem du er, og hvad du vil bidrage med — så vender vi tilbage hurtigt.
da.modal_error: Kunne ikke sende lige nu. Prøv igen — eller skriv til
da.modal_bg_placeholder: Kort oversigt over uddannelse, stilretninger, erfaring…
da.modal_msg_placeholder: Hvad vil du gerne undervise i / bidrage med? Hvilket format foreslår du (modul, workshop, 30–50 timer, mentorship osv.)?
da.modal_extra_hint: Max 6 MB pr. fil. Brug link til store videoer.
da.modal_consent: Jeg accepterer, at Yoga Bible må kontakte mig om denne forespørgsel.
da.modal_fine: Ved at sende accepterer du, at vi må behandle oplysningerne for at kunne kontakte dig.
da.modal_success_msg: Vi har modtaget din forespørgsel. Du får en bekræftelse på e-mail om lidt.
da.js_too_many_files: For mange filer. Vælg færre bilag.
da.js_file_too_large_prefix: En fil er for stor. Max

en.hero_lead: Yoga Bible is a professional school where people develop from regular practice to teaching, specialization, and deeper expertise. We are expanding the team with experienced instructors, mentors, and creative professionals.
en.hero_li2: Modules in anatomy, philosophy, breathwork, pre/postnatal, and more
en.hero_li5: Marketing, social media, filming, editing, and content
en.hero_fine: We welcome both specific inquiries and ideas for new programs, workshops, or training modules.
en.need_subtitle: We collaborate with experienced professionals who can elevate parts of our trainings, courses, or create new programs with us.
en.need_card1_desc: Experienced instructors in all styles — for classes, events, and collaboration.
en.need_card3_desc: 30–50 hour programs, weekend intensives, workshops, and masterclasses.
en.need_card4_desc: 1:1 programs in practice, teaching, and business.
en.need_card5_desc: Help us tell the story — sharp, calm, and professional.
en.need_card6_desc: Structure, client experience, and communication at a high standard.
en.need_idea_desc: If you want to introduce a new discipline or concept, we would love to hear about it.
en.steps_subtitle: A simple process — clear expectations, high quality, and a professional setup.
en.step1_desc: You send a short pitch + background. We respond quickly with the next step.
en.step2_desc: We align on content, target audience, timeline, and financials (project, module, or ongoing collaboration).
en.step3_desc: We often start with a pilot program to ensure the right experience for students.
en.steps_cta_desc: We are always open to meeting talented people with strong skills.
en.why_subtitle: We work with a clear professional direction and an audience that seeks progression — not noise.
en.why1_desc: Structure, methodology, and high standards in teaching, communication, and student experience.
en.why2_desc: Students and practitioners who take their development seriously — from basics to specialization.
en.why3_desc: Based in Copenhagen, with opportunities for module-based collaboration and flexible formats.
en.what_we_ask_desc: Brief introduction, experience, format suggestion — and preferably a CV/portfolio.
en.faq_subtitle: Get answers to the most common questions.
en.faq1_q: What language do you teach in?
en.faq1_a: We teach primarily in Danish and English. Some modules may be bilingual depending on the group.
en.faq2_q: Is it a permanent position or project-based?
en.faq2_a: Both. Many collaborations start project-based (workshop/module) and can develop further.
en.faq3_q: What if I want to propose an entirely new course?
en.faq3_a: Perfect. Select "Other collaboration" in the form and describe the idea, target audience, and duration.
en.faq4_a: Yes. Upload small files (CV/photos). For large videos: paste a link (YouTube/Vimeo/Drive) in the message field.
en.bottom_cta_title: We look forward to hearing from you
en.bottom_cta_desc: Send your inquiry — we will get back to you quickly with the next step.
en.modal_lead: Tell us briefly who you are and what you would like to contribute — and we will get back to you quickly.
en.modal_error: Could not send right now. Try again — or write to
en.modal_category_error: Select at least one main area
en.modal_bg_placeholder: Brief overview of education, styles, experience…
en.modal_msg_placeholder: What would you like to teach / contribute? What format do you suggest (module, workshop, 30-50 hours, mentorship, etc.)?
en.modal_extra_hint: Max 6 MB per file. Use a link for large videos.
en.modal_consent: I accept that Yoga Bible may contact me about this inquiry.
en.modal_fine: By submitting, you accept that we may process the information to contact you.
en.modal_success_msg: We have received your inquiry. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
en.js_too_many_files: Too many files. Select fewer attachments.
en.js_file_too_large_prefix: A file is too large. Max
